release_notes: v4.7.74 — NAS Status page now surfaces Temperature, CPU Temp, Voltage (V), Current (mA), Power (W), Fan 1 / Fan 2 RPM, PSU 1 / PSU 2 state and overall Power Status (Dual-PSU OK / Single-PSU / FAULT) — only rendered when the router actually reports them (CCR / CRS hardware). Existing rows (CPU load, Memory, Uptime, Active Users) preserved.
force_update_message: v4.7.74 adds full hardware-sensor block to the NAS Status page. Please update.
soft_update_message: v4.7.74 — NAS Status: Temperature · Voltage · Current · Power · Fan RPM · PSU state · Power Status.
